title: Acrolasia affinis
taxonomy: Acrolasia affinis belongs to the class Magnoliopsida. The order to which it belongs is Celastrales. Acrolasia affinis is a species within the family Celastraceae. It is native to tropical Asia, particularly found in India and Southeast Asia. More research is required to provide further classification details.
